skills.description: Analyzes web performance using Chrome DevTools MCP. Measures Core Web Vitals (FCP, LCP, TBT, CLS, Speed Index), identifies render-blocking resources, network dependency chains, layout shifts, caching issues, and accessibility gaps. Use when asked to audit, profile, debug, or optimize page load performance, Lighthouse scores, or site speed.

skills.name: workers-best-practices
skills.description: Reviews and authors Cloudflare Workers code against production best practices. Load when writing new Workers, reviewing Worker code, configuring wrangler.jsonc, or checking for common Workers anti-patterns (streaming, floating promises, global state, secrets, bindings, observability). Biases towards retrieval from Cloudflare docs over pre-trained knowledge.

skills.name: wrangler
skills.description: Cloudflare Workers CLI for deploying, developing, and managing Workers, KV, R2, D1, Vectorize, Hyperdrive, Workers AI, Containers, Queues, Workflows, Pipelines, and Secrets Store. Load before running wrangler commands to ensure correct syntax and best practices.

plugins.description: Patterns for designing CLIs that coding agents can run reliably: flags, help with examples, pipelines, errors, idempotency, dry-run.

plugins.description: Render PR diffs as interactive Cursor Canvases organized for reviewer comprehension — groups changes by importance, separates boilerplate from core logic, and highlights tricky or unexpected code.

plugins.name: docs-canvas
plugins.description: Render documentation — architecture notes, API references, runbooks, and codebase walkthroughs — as a navigable Cursor Canvas with sections, table of contents, diagrams, and cross-references.

plugins.name: cursor-sdk
plugins.description: Build apps, scripts, CI pipelines, and automations on top of the Cursor TypeScript SDK (@cursor/sdk) — runtime selection, auth, streaming, MCP, error handling, and ready-to-extend integration patterns.

plugins.name: orchestrate
plugins.description: Fan large tasks out across parallel Cursor cloud agents with planners, workers, verifiers, and structured handoffs.

plugins.name: pstack
plugins.description: if you want to go fast, go deep first. pstack helps you write less, but higher quality code. rigorous agent workflows you can parallelize with confidence.
